summary: Login screen blinking/refresh loop bug fix (SECOND ATTEMPT) verified successfully. All 7 test scenarios passed. The key fixes in App.js (isLoggingIn ref, logout blocking during login) and PermissionContext.js (using direct fetch() instead of api()) are working correctly.

features_tested.details: User can log in with valid credentials and stays on dashboard without any flicker

features_tested.feature: Loading spinner shows during initial auth check
features_tested.details: Spinner with animate-spin class detected during both initial load and token validation

features_tested.feature: After login, dashboard renders without flicker
features_tested.details: Dashboard stable for 5+ seconds after login with no blinking detected

features_tested.feature: Permission fetching doesn't trigger logout loop
features_tested.details: PermissionContext uses direct fetch() at lines 239-252, dashboard remains stable after permissions load

features_tested.feature: Multiple rapid login attempts are prevented
features_tested.details: isLoggingIn ref at line 77 prevents race conditions - rapid clicks handled gracefully

features_tested.feature: Token validation on page refresh doesn't cause blinking
features_tested.details: User stays logged in after page refresh, no blinking detected

features_tested.feature: Logout cannot interrupt login in progress
features_tested.details: Logout function checks isLoggingIn.current at line 89 before proceeding
Loading spinner shown, then graceful redirect to login page - token cleared from localStorage
Page stays on login form without refresh loop after failed login attempt

fix_1_isLoggingIn_ref.description: isLoggingIn ref added to prevent race conditions between login attempts

fix_2_logout_blocks_during_login.description: Logout checks if (isLoggingOut.current || isLoggingIn.current) return; to prevent logout during login

fix_3_login_uses_isLoggingIn_guard.description: Login function checks if (isLoggingIn.current) and returns early to prevent multiple simultaneous attempts

fix_4_login_finally_block.description: isLoggingIn.current = false in finally block ensures ref is always reset

fix_5_permission_context_direct_fetch.description: Uses direct fetch() with token from localStorage instead of api() to avoid logout loop on 401

fix_6_permission_context_graceful_failur.description: On failed permission fetch, sets empty permissions instead of triggering logout

fix_7_permission_ref_reset_on_logout.description: permsFetchedRef.current = false resets when user logs out

context_for_next_testing_agent: Login blinking bug fix (second attempt) verified. Key changes: (1) isLoggingIn ref at App.js:77 prevents race conditions, (2) Logout blocked during login at App.js:89, (3) PermissionContext.js lines 229-252 uses direct fetch() instead of api() to avoid logout loop on permission fetch failure. All login scenarios tested: fresh login, rapid clicks, page refresh, invalid token, invalid credentials - all working without blinking.
